flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Samford University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.4k → $40.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Samford University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.4k → $40.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Samford University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Samford University are 35% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($58.5k vs $43.5k).
